name: ActorEventPacket
comment: packetId:27, description:All kinds of actor state changes (see Actor::handleEntityEvent).
label: ActorEventPacket

name: ActorPickRequestPacket
comment: packetId:35, description:Player clicks on an actor in the world, eg a chicken.
label: ActorPickRequestPacket

comment: packetId:22, description:Sends the information for a new painting actor from server to client.

name: AddVolumeEntityPacket
comment: packetId:166, description:Sends a volume entity's definition and components from server to client.
label: AddVolumeEntityPacket

name: AgentActionEventPacket
comment: packetId:181, description:packet containing data of Agent Action Type
label: AgentActionEventPacket

name: AgentAnimationPacket
comment: packetId:304, description:Broadcasted to other players when an Agent performs an animation so it gets properly replicated.
label: AgentAnimationPacket

name: AnimateEntityPacket
comment: packetId:158, description:The AnimateEntityPacket is used to trigger a one - off animation on the client it is sent to.
label: AnimateEntityPacket

name: AnvilDamagePacket
comment: packetId:141, description:Requests an anvil to be damaged.
label: AnvilDamagePacket

name: AvailableActorIdentifiersPacket
comment: packetId:119, description:Sends the whole list of actor identifiers at game start from the server.
label: AvailableActorIdentifiersPacket

name: AvailableCommandsPacket
comment: packetId:76, description:Contains all the available commands.
label: AvailableCommandsPacket

name: AwardAchievementPacket
comment: packetId:309, description:Contains the ID of the achievement to award
label: AwardAchievementPacket

fields.name: Map of Biome names to data

name: BlockActorDataPacket
comment: packetId:56, description:Sends the entire user data compound tag and the block position to the client.
label: BlockActorDataPacket

name: BlockEventPacket
comment: packetId:26, description:Whenever a block event happens it is sent from the server to sync client and server, with arbitrarily encoded information in b0 and b1.
label: BlockEventPacket

name: BlockPickRequestPacket
comment: packetId:34, description:Player picks up a block in the world; client to server.
label: BlockPickRequestPacket

name: BookEditPacket
comment: packetId:97, description:Sends the updated state of the Book and Quill item from client to server during use.
label: BookEditPacket

name: CameraAimAssistActorPriorityPacket
comment: packetId:339, description:Camera aim-assist actor priority data sent from the server to clients.
label: CameraAimAssistActorPriorityPacket

name: CameraAimAssistPresetsPacket
comment: packetId:320, description:Camera aim-assist registry presets/categories data sent from the server to clients.
label: CameraAimAssistPresetsPacket

name: CameraInstructionPacket
comment: packetId:300, description:Used to send a CameraInstruction from the server to the specified clients.
label: CameraInstructionPacket

name: CameraPacket
comment: packetId:73, description:Used only in EDU through the tripod camera item or the TakePictureCommand. Sends the camera actor id and the target player id from the server.
label: CameraPacket

name: CameraPresetsPacket
comment: packetId:198, description:Used to sync CameraPresets data from server to clients.
label: CameraPresetsPacket

name: CameraShakePacket
comment: packetId:159, description:Used to control trigger camera shake movements on the client's player camera
label: CameraShakePacket

name: CameraSplinePacket
comment: packetId:338, description:Camera custom spline data sent from server to client.
label: CameraSplinePacket

name: ChangeDimensionPacket
comment: packetId:61, description:The server sends this packet from the level to kick off dimension changing process.
label: ChangeDimensionPacket

name: ChangeMobPropertyPacket
comment: packetId:182, description:packet containing data for changing mob property
label: ChangeMobPropertyPacket

name: ChunkRadiusUpdatedPacket
comment: packetId:70, description:Sent when the world is loading. We don't know why it is sent four times. Defines the tick distance.
label: ChunkRadiusUpdatedPacket

name: ClientCacheStatusPacket
comment: packetId:129, description:It is sent by the Client once, at login, to communicate if it supports the cache or not.
label: ClientCacheStatusPacket

name: ClientToServerHandshakePacket
comment: packetId:4, description:Sets up encryption and authenticates in educational version once at level startup from client.
label: ClientToServerHandshakePacket

name: ClientboundAttributeLayerSyncPacket
comment: packetId:345, description:Syncs Attribute Layers to the Client (Currently disabled)
label: ClientboundAttributeLayerSyncPacket

name: ClientboundCloseFormPacket
comment: packetId:310, description:Sent from the server to client to force close all server forms on the stack and return to the HUD screen.
label: ClientboundCloseFormPacket

name: ClientboundControlSchemeSetPacket
comment: packetId:327, description:Set the control scheme that the player should use
label: ClientboundControlSchemeSetPacket

name: ClientboundDataDrivenUICloseScreenPacket
comment: packetId:334, description:Allows the server to tell the client to close Data Driven UI screens.
label: ClientboundDataDrivenUICloseScreenPacket

name: ClientboundDataDrivenUIReloadPacket
comment: packetId:335, description:Allows the server to tell the client to reload the Data Driven UI.
label: ClientboundDataDrivenUIReloadPacket

name: ClientboundDataDrivenUIShowScreenPacket
comment: packetId:333, description:Allows the server to tell the client to show a Data Driven UI screen.
label: ClientboundDataDrivenUIShowScreenPacket

name: ClientboundDataStorePacket
comment: packetId:330, description:Sends a list of data store properties from the server to the client.
label: ClientboundDataStorePacket

name: ClientboundDebugRendererPacket
comment: packetId:164, description:Used to add/remove debug rendering objects.
label: ClientboundDebugRendererPacket

fields.name: Dependency on 'DecorationUpdate, TextureUpdate, or Creation Bit Field'

name: ClientboundTextureShiftPacket
comment: packetId:336, description:Sends a set of update properties for the texture shift system from the server to the client.
label: ClientboundTextureShiftPacket

name: CodeBuilderSourcePacket
comment: packetId:178, description:This is EDU exclusive, used in getInterface() of WebviewSystem
label: CodeBuilderSourcePacket

name: CommandOutputPacket
comment: packetId:79, description:"slash" command execution output, server to client.
label: CommandOutputPacket

name: CommandRequestPacket
comment: packetId:77, description:"slash" command execution, client to server.
label: CommandRequestPacket

name: CompletedUsingItemPacket
comment: packetId:142, description:Send server to client to complete the using item process. An example is when you finish drinking or eating.
label: CompletedUsingItemPacket

name: ContainerClosePacket
comment:
packetId:47, description:After the game deletes the container manager on the client, the client sends this packet.
	Then the server deletes its container manager, and sends a packet back to the client that closes the container screen.
label: ContainerClosePacket

name: ContainerOpenPacket
comment: packetId:46, description:Sent from the server so that the client knows to open the container screen and do the chest opening animation.
label: ContainerOpenPacket

name: ContainerRegistryCleanupPacket
comment: packetId:317, description:This is used to trigger a clientside cleanup of the dynamic container registry.
label: ContainerRegistryCleanupPacket

name: ContainerSetDataPacket
comment: packetId:51, description:This is sent from the server basically any time that the "cooking" state of the brewing stand or the furnace changes (i.e. the loading bar)
label: ContainerSetDataPacket

name: CorrectPlayerMovePredictionPacket
comment: packetId:161, description:Sent to a player when their simulation of movement mismatches enough from the server that it wants to correct the client.
label: CorrectPlayerMovePredictionPacket

name: CreatePhotoPacket
comment: packetId:171, description:Players now have the possibility to export photos from their portfolios into photo items in their inventory. EDU.
label: CreatePhotoPacket

name: CurrentStructureFeaturePacket
comment: packetId:314, description:Informs the client of which Structure Feature they are currently occupying.
label: CurrentStructureFeaturePacket

name: DeathInfoPacket
comment: packetId:189, description:Sent from the server to client when player dies (Level::onPlayerDeath).
label: DeathInfoPacket

name: DebugDrawerPacket
comment: packetId:328, description:Send debug drawing shape info (from scripting) to the client for rendering
label: DebugDrawerPacket

fields.name: Array of debug shapes (can be a mix of new, updated or removed)

name: DebugInfoPacket
comment: packetId:155, description:The system sends debug information via a generic network packet. This enables rendering of any server information on the client in for instance ImGui.
label: DebugInfoPacket

name: EditorNetworkPacket
comment: packetId:190, description:General use Editor specific packet - carries a payload of whatever serialized data that the individual IEditorNetworkPayload generates.
label: EditorNetworkPacket

name: EduUriResourcePacket
comment: packetId:170, description:Transmits Edu Shared Uri Resource settings to all clients.
label: EduUriResourcePacket

name: EducationSettingsPacket
comment: packetId:137, description:Transmits EducationLevelSettings to all clients.
label: EducationSettingsPacket

name: EmoteListPacket
comment: packetId:152, description:Allows clients to download emotes that other clients have equipped.
label: EmoteListPacket

name: EmotePacket
comment: packetId:138, description:A client sends this to the server to notify other clients about the emote.
label: EmotePacket

name: FeatureRegistryPacket
comment: packetId:191, description:This is the packet that tracks the active feature registry data from the server so that client can place the features themselves.
label: FeatureRegistryPacket

name: GraphicsOverrideParameterPacket
comment: packetId:331, description:Sent from the server to the client when a server script changes the rendering settings
label: GraphicsOverrideParameterPacket

name: GuiDataPickItemPacket
comment: packetId:54, description:The server telling the client what item slot to hover over in the hotbar.
label: GuiDataPickItemPacket

fields.name: Dependency on 'Above ID (the legacy request ID) nonzero'

name: ItemRegistryPacket
comment: packetId:162, description:Item data from the server. Contains component information.
label: ItemRegistryPacket

name: JigsawStructureDataPacket
comment: packetId:313, description:Jigsaw Structure data used by client jigsaw structure worldgen. This packet contains a copy of the behavior pack jigsaw structure rules.
label: JigsawStructureDataPacket

name: LabTablePacket
comment: packetId:109, description:For the EDU Chemistry Lab Table block actor.
label: LabTablePacket

name: LecternUpdatePacket
comment: packetId:125, description:This is used for the Lectern Block Actor.
label: LecternUpdatePacket

name: LegacyTelemetryEventPacket
comment: packetId:65, description:Sends telemetry events to the client so the client can then send that on to the eventing system
label: LegacyTelemetryEventPacket

children.name: Partial SubChunk Count When Client Requesting

name: LevelEventPacket
comment: packetId:25, description:Splash Potions, weather events, global pause, simlock commands, oh my!
label: LevelEventPacket

name: LocatorBarPacket
comment: packetId:341, description:Syncs LocatorBar changes on the server with the client.
label: LocatorBarPacket

name: LoginPacket
comment: packetId:1, description:Sent once from client to server at login. About 100k.
label: LoginPacket

name: MapCreateLockedCopyPacket
comment: packetId:131, description:This is fired when the user locks a map item utilizing the Cartography Table in game.
label: MapCreateLockedCopyPacket

name: MapInfoRequestPacket
comment: packetId:68, description:In the case of the client being unable to find map data for a map item it sends a uuid for a map to the server.
label: MapInfoRequestPacket

name: ModalFormResponsePacket
comment: packetId:101, description:Fired in response to third party server request to show the custom UI screen.
label: ModalFormResponsePacket

name: MotionPredictionHintsPacket
comment: packetId:157, description:It is essentially a SetActionMotionPacket with a bool indicating if the actor was on the ground at the time the packet is sent or not.
label: MotionPredictionHintsPacket

name: MoveActorAbsolutePacket
comment: packetId:18, description:This is used primarily for motion updates of all actors from server to client.
label: MoveActorAbsolutePacket

name: MovementEffectPacket
comment: packetId:318, description:These packets are sent to the client to update specific MovementEffects
label: MovementEffectPacket

name: NetworkChunkPublisherUpdatePacket
comment: packetId:121, description:Tells clients to update the chunk view for the local player.
label: NetworkChunkPublisherUpdatePacket

name: NetworkSettingsPacket
comment: packetId:143, description:Sends tunable options from host to client (compression threshold and algorithm)
label: NetworkSettingsPacket

name: NpcDialoguePacket
comment: packetId:169, description:Sent from the server to client when remote firing an NPC dialogue window for a client
label: NpcDialoguePacket

name: NpcRequestPacket
comment: packetId:98, description:Used for a number of interactions with the NPC Component
label: NpcRequestPacket

name: OpenSignPacket
comment: packetId:303, description:Sent from the server so that the client knows to open the sign screen.
label: OpenSignPacket

name: PacketViolationWarningPacket
comment: packetId:156, description:This is sent when the client detects a malformed packet
label: PacketViolationWarningPacket

name: PartyChangedPacket
comment: packetId:342, description:Sent by the client to provide additional client metadata.
label: PartyChangedPacket

name: PhotoTransferPacket
comment: packetId:99, description:There is a camera item in EDU and they can use it to take screenshots and add them to a scrapbook.
label: PhotoTransferPacket

name: PlaySoundPacket
comment: packetId:86, description:This packet is only used via command or script event. This is for 3rd party content.
label: PlaySoundPacket

name: PlayStatusPacket
comment: packetId:2, description:Describes the login status of the player
label: PlayStatusPacket

name: PlayerActionPacket
comment: packetId:36, description:Sent from the client whenever the player performs an action (dashing, un-dashing, use an item, mine/hit, use a block, etc).
label: PlayerActionPacket

name: PlayerArmorDamagePacket
comment: packetId:149, description:Sent from server whenever the player's armor takes damage.
label: PlayerArmorDamagePacket

fields.name: Dependency on 'ItemUseTransaction and PerformItemInteraction bit set'
Dependency on 'ItemStackRequest and PerformItemStackRequest bit set'

name: PlayerHotbarPacket
comment: packetId:48, description:Sent from the server when the player uses pick block on actors or blocks, in addition to the player uses the clear, give, or replace item command or if the serverplayer uses _sendAdditionalLevelData().
label: PlayerHotbarPacket

name: PlayerSkinPacket
comment: packetId:93, description:Used when the player changes their skin
label: PlayerSkinPacket

name: PlayerVideoCapturePacket
comment: packetId:324, description:Used by a test command to start/stop video capture
label: PlayerVideoCapturePacket

fields.name: Player Waxed or Unwaxed Copper Block ID

name: PositionTrackingDBClientRequestPacket
comment: packetId:154, description:Position Tracking DB Client Request
label: PositionTrackingDBClientRequestPacket

name: PositionTrackingDBServerBroadcastPacket
comment: packetId:153, description:Server to client packet for server authoratative runtime database (with persistent LevelStorage backup) designed primarily to track lodestone stuff. See Position Tracking DB Notes.md in bedrock-docs.
label: PositionTrackingDBServerBroadcastPacket

name: PurchaseReceiptPacket
comment: packetId:92, description:Sent from client to server
label: PurchaseReceiptPacket

name: RemoveActorPacket
comment: packetId:14, description:Occasionally, during the server player tick some time is taken to remove nearby actors from the world.
label: RemoveActorPacket

name: RemoveObjectivePacket
comment: packetId:106, description:Using the scoreboard command, users can remove objectives that are tracked on the scoreboard.
label: RemoveObjectivePacket

name: RemoveVolumeEntityPacket
comment: packetId:167, description:Sends a volume entity to be removed from server to client.
label: RemoveVolumeEntityPacket

name: RequestAbilityPacket
comment: packetId:184, description:Sent from client to server. Used to request an ability change.
label: RequestAbilityPacket

name: RequestChunkRadiusPacket
comment: packetId:69, description:The client can't just change the view radius without the server's approval, otherwise there could be holes on unrendered area.
label: RequestChunkRadiusPacket

name: RequestNetworkSettingsPacket
comment: packetId:193, description:Requests tunable options from host to client (compression threshold and algorithm).
label: RequestNetworkSettingsPacket

name: RequestPermissionsPacket
comment: packetId:185, description:Sent from client to server. Used to request a new Permissions Levels.
label: RequestPermissionsPacket

name: ResourcePacksReadyForValidationPacket
comment: packetId:340, description:Used to inform the server that the client has finished loading all resource packs.
label: ResourcePacksReadyForValidationPacket

name: RespawnPacket
comment: packetId:45, description:Sent as a handshake between the client and server to respawn the player.
label: RespawnPacket

name: ScriptMessagePacket
comment: packetId:177, description:Used to send custom messages between client and server.
label: ScriptMessagePacket

name: ServerPlayerPostMovePositionPacket
comment: packetId:16, description:Used to send a player's server position to the respective client at the end of movement.
label: ServerPlayerPostMovePositionPacket

name: ServerSettingsRequestPacket
comment: packetId:102, description:Sent during the initialization of world settings on the client.
label: ServerSettingsRequestPacket

name: ServerStatsPacket
comment: packetId:192, description:Used to send performance and other valuable stats back to the client
label: ServerStatsPacket

name: ServerboundDataDrivenScreenClosedPacket
comment: packetId:343, description:Sent from the client to the server when a data driven screen is closed.
label: ServerboundDataDrivenScreenClosedPacket

name: ServerboundDataStorePacket
comment: packetId:332, description:Applies a single update to the server data store from the client.
label: ServerboundDataStorePacket

name: ServerboundDiagnosticsPacket
comment: packetId:315, description:Sent from the client to the server IF ProfilerLite is enabled AND the creator toggle for additional client telemetry is enabled AND new telemetry data is ready (every 500 ms).
label: ServerboundDiagnosticsPacket

name: ServerboundLoadingScreenPacket
comment: packetId:312, description:Sent from the client to the server to message to the server about the state of the loading screen.
label: ServerboundLoadingScreenPacket

name: ServerboundPackSettingChangePacket
comment: packetId:329, description:Sent from the client to the server when players change Pack Settings (pack UI).
label: ServerboundPackSettingChangePacket

children.name: std::vector<class std::unique_ptr<class DataItem,struct std::default_delete<class DataItem> >,class std::allocator<class std::unique_ptr<class DataItem,struct std::default_delete<class DataItem> > > >

name: SetActorLinkPacket
comment: packetId:41, description:Sent by both client and server, only received by LegacyClientHandler.
label: SetActorLinkPacket

name: SetActorMotionPacket
comment: packetId:40, description:This is used for the server to set the velocity of a client actor.
label: SetActorMotionPacket

name: SetCommandsEnabledPacket
comment: packetId:59, description:This is used by the world settings screen, cheats, EDU builds for teachers, and various other places to enable cheats/commands
label: SetCommandsEnabledPacket

name: SetDefaultGameTypePacket
comment: packetId:105, description:Same as SetPlayerGameTypePacket & UpdatePlayerGameTypePacket, the only difference is that this changes the default for all clients.
label: SetDefaultGameTypePacket

name: SetDisplayObjectivePacket
comment: packetId:107, description:Sent from the server for 3rd party content to display current objectives and status
label: SetDisplayObjectivePacket

name: SetHealthPacket
comment: packetId:42, description:This packet is sent to the client when the player is spawned in and when they respawn.
label: SetHealthPacket

name: SetHudPacket
comment: packetId:308, description:This packet is only used via the set hud command. This is for 3rd party content.
label: SetHudPacket

name: SetLastHurtByPacket
comment: packetId:96, description:Any time a player is hit, the id of the last mob that attacked them is sent to the client
label: SetLastHurtByPacket

name: SetLocalPlayerAsInitializedPacket
comment: packetId:113, description:Set Local Player As Initialized
label: SetLocalPlayerAsInitializedPacket

name: SetSpawnPositionPacket
comment: packetId:43, description:When a player logs in or the SetWorldSpawnCommand is used this is sent from the server to the client. Does not change when using a bed, that is a separate packet (RespawnPacket)
label: SetSpawnPositionPacket

name: SetTitlePacket
comment: packetId:88, description:Used by 3rd party content for the purpose of showing ui banners
label: SetTitlePacket

name: SettingsCommandPacket
comment: packetId:140, description:Requests a setting to be changed through commands.
label: SettingsCommandPacket

name: ShowCreditsPacket
comment: packetId:75, description:Starts on server when the credits screen should pop up.
label: ShowCreditsPacket

name: ShowStoreOfferPacket
comment: packetId:91, description:Used for redirecting a user to the right offer.
label: ShowStoreOfferPacket

name: SimpleEventPacket
comment: packetId:64, description:This packet is used for enabling/disabling commands and for unlocking world template settings (both unlocking UI buttons on client and the actual setting on the server).
label: SimpleEventPacket

name: SimulationTypePacket
comment: packetId:168, description:Sent from the server to the client when setting the simulation type for toolbox mode. (Not yet suported)
label: SimulationTypePacket

name: SpawnParticleEffectPacket
comment: packetId:118, description:Tell client to spawn a particle effect.
label: SpawnParticleEffectPacket

fields.name: Does the packet contain server join information.

name: StopSoundPacket
comment: packetId:87, description:Allows you to stop a sound or all sounds on all clients, only used in a /command
label: StopSoundPacket

name: StructureTemplateDataRequestPacket
comment: packetId:132, description:Used to request structure information from a server.
label: StructureTemplateDataRequestPacket

children.name: Should Allow Non Ticking Player and Ticking Area Chunks

name: StructureTemplateDataResponsePacket
comment: packetId:133, description:This is used in exporting from load, exporting from save, and querying saved structures from structure blocks.
label: StructureTemplateDataResponsePacket

children.name: Dependency on 'Cache Disabled or SubChunk Request Result SuccessAllAir?'
Dependency on 'Render Height Map Has Data'

name: SyncActorPropertyPacket
comment: packetId:165, description:Allows us to synchronize Actor properties across the network.
label: SyncActorPropertyPacket

name: SyncWorldClocksPacket
comment: packetId:344, description:Initializes and syncs world clocks from the server to clients. (Currently disabled)
label: SyncWorldClocksPacket

name: TakeItemActorPacket
comment: packetId:17, description:A packet sent to the server when deal with picking up an item off the ground in the world.
label: TakeItemActorPacket

name: TextPacket
comment: packetId:9, description:Represents a text message that needs to be displayed in-game
label: TextPacket

name: TickingAreasLoadStatusPacket
comment: packetId:179, description:Used to inform the client that the server is waiting for ticking areas to finish preloading.
label: TickingAreasLoadStatusPacket

name: ToastRequestPacket
comment: packetId:186, description:Pushes a UI toast message to be displayed by the client
label: ToastRequestPacket

name: TransferPacket
comment: packetId:85, description:Used to kick off transferring the client between online games, or it can be used to cause players to quit the world and rejoin.
label: TransferPacket

name: UnlockedRecipesPacket
comment: packetId:199, description:Sent from server to client, for all previously unlocked recipes on load and for any newly unlocked recipes during gameplay.
label: UnlockedRecipesPacket

name: UpdateBlockPacket
comment: packetId:21, description:Occasional packets sent from server when blocks update or are ticked. (For example, when digging.)
label: UpdateBlockPacket

name: UpdateBlockSyncedPacket
comment: packetId:110, description:Used to sync moving blocks with clients so they render correctly
label: UpdateBlockSyncedPacket

name: UpdateClientOptionsPacket
comment: packetId:323, description:Sync the player's options (mostly settings) to the server.
label: UpdateClientOptionsPacket

name: UpdateEquipPacket
comment: packetId:81, description:Seemingly only used for the Horse Inventory... More specifically when the player opens the horse inventory.
label: UpdateEquipPacket

name: UpdatePlayerGameTypePacket
comment: packetId:151, description:The server will send this back to all clients on receipt of the SetPlayerGameTypePacket so that cached game type and permissions flags in mLevel on all clients is kept up to date.
label: UpdatePlayerGameTypePacket

name: UpdateSoftEnumPacket
comment: packetId:114, description:This is used for the scoreboard and tag systems (overwhelmingly used by 3rd party content)
label: UpdateSoftEnumPacket

name: UpdateSubChunkBlocksPacket
comment: packetId:172, description:Packet sent for every set of blocks changed in a sub chunk every tick.
label: UpdateSubChunkBlocksPacket

name: UpdateTradePacket
comment: packetId:80, description:This is used when the player trades with an npc. This sends all of the updated trade info in one big ol' packet.
label: UpdateTradePacket

name: VoxelShapesPacket
comment: packetId:337, description:Syncs client with server voxel shape data on world join. This packet contains a copy of all behavior pack voxel shapes data.
label: VoxelShapesPacket

fields.name: Reliability Type (3 bits), is packet split? (1 bit)
